title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners:
IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kharagpur South Asia Partners!
